improvement_bullets: Designed and executed complex data modeling strategies to support AI-driven insights, ensuring scalable data architecture for analytical reporting.
Leveraged hands-on skills in SQL and Python to build automated data pipelines, directly supporting the tuning and evaluation of performance metrics.
Communicated complex statistical trends and analytical findings through data storytelling, tailoring presentations to effectively engage both technical teams and non-technical stakeholders.
Authorized to work in the United States and eager to contribute as an early-career professional, leveraging my background to solve complex data challenges.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate raw data into actionable narratives, facilitating data-driven decision-making for product improvement.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst (New York) opportunity with Jobright.ai. I am interested in this opportunity because Jobright’s mission to optimize career navigation through AI-driven insights aligns perfectly with my background in building data-backed solutions. What interests me about working for Jobright.ai is its commitment to moving beyond static dashboards to create AI agents that actively improve the candidate experience; this focus on actionable, product-shaping analysis truly inspires me. I believe my hands-on technical proficiency in Python and SQL and my ability to translate complex data into accessible narratives would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing clear communication between technical and non-technical teams. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in client onboarding and utilized Python and Zapier to automate scheduling workflows. The result was an 8-hour weekly time saving and a 300% increase in customer acquisition, showcasing my ability to turn raw operational data into tangible business growth. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst role at Jobright.ai would allow me to bring my data modeling skills to inform how your AI agents are tuned and evaluated. Additionally, my role as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my data storytelling skills. During a project analyzing 250K+ arrest records, I designed an interactive Tableau dashboard and delivered a presentation that provided actionable insights for city stakeholders, successfully translating statistical trends into clear recommendations for safety initiatives. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my SQL and Python skills in working on the development and improvement of AI agent performance at Jobright.ai. I know that my technical modeling expertise and communication skills align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
